title: Mosaic
description: Mosaic is a mod which one add a new mosaics which showed at Minecraft Live 2022
body:
Chiseled planks - These a new building blocks which can rotate and make very good atmosphere in your 
                                 building/house. You can craft it if you put a wood plank to the stone cutter!

Mosaics - These are the building blocks that can create new beautiful patterns in Minecraft. There are as many of 
                   them as wood in 1.16.5, 1.18.2 and 1.19.2. the crafting is shown below.

Dried Bamboo - In the first version of the mod only a bundle is available and a mosaic of bamboo in 1.0.1 there be 
                             other stuff that Mojang showed. Сraft recipes below. Doors and trapdoors craft as like a vanilla.

—————————————

! Fabric&Forge supported !
